turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, refunds team here. What can I sort out for you today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Before we get into it, this call may be recorded for quality and training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can I grab the name and order email so I can find the order?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, both the name and email are what you've got on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: The product showed up broken and I want my money back.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood. Give me a moment to look at what happened here.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I'll process the full amount back to your original payment method.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So when will it actually land in my account?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, as long as it's the full amount.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Refund's processed, you'll see it within a few business days. Anything else?
